---
title: "Aedes aegypti mosquito maps"
---

Sitios de muestreo.

```{r}
#| column: screen-inset
library(terra)
library(leaflet)
library(leafem)
library(leaflet.extras)
library(leafpop)
library(tidyverse)

d <- vect("datos/d.gpkg")
d_centro <- ext(d) |>
  vect(crs = "EPSG:4326") |>
  centroids() |>
  geom()

leaflet(d, height = 600) |>
  setView(
    lng = as.numeric(d_centro[, "x"]),
    lat = as.numeric(d_centro[, "y"]),
    zoom = 8
  ) |>
  addTiles(group = "OSM (default)") |>
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$CartoDB.Positron,
    group = "Positron (minimal)",
    options = providerTileOptions(noWrap = TRUE)
  ) |>
  addProviderTiles(
    providers$Esri.WorldImagery,
    group = "World Imagery (satellite)",
    options = providerTileOptions(noWrap = TRUE)
  ) |>
  addMarkers(
    group = "grupo",
    icon = icons(
      iconUrl = "https://api.iconify.design/eva/pin-fill.svg?height=30&color=%23f86501"
    ),
    clusterOptions = markerClusterOptions(
      spiderLegPolylineOptions = list(
        weight = 1.5,
        color = "#12AA56",
        opacity = 0.5
      )
    )
  ) |>
  addLayersControl(
    baseGroups = c(
      "OSM (default)",
      "Positron (minimal)",
      "World Imagery (satellite)"
    ),
    overlayGroups = "grupo",
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = TRUE)
  ) |>
  addResetMapButton() |>
  addFullscreenControl(position = "bottomright")
```
